document_metadata.first_words: # Coronavirus: What is mass testing in schools actually like? We have heard a lot about how testing can help reduce the spread of the coronavirus. So, the government have said they will be rolling out more mass-testing facilities in schools over the next few weeks, where every student and staff member is tested regularly. Newsround spoke to some pupils from a school in Liverpool, who were one of the first in the country to experience what turned out to be a military operation... Check this out!

# Coronavirus: What is mass testing in schools actually like?

## To play this video you need to enable JavaScript in your browser.

This video can not be played

Coronavirus: What is mass testing in schools actually like?Close

**We have heard a lot about how testing can help reduce the spread of the coronavirus.**

So, the government have said they will be rolling out more mass-testing facilities in schools over the next few weeks, where every student and staff member is tested regularly.

Newsround spoke to some pupils from a school in Liverpool, who were one of the first in the country to experience what turned out to be a military operation...

Check this out!

- Published7 December 2020

# Coronavirus: What is mass testing in schools actually like?

## To play this video you need to enable JavaScript in your browser.

This video can not be played

Coronavirus: What is mass testing in schools actually like?Close

**We have heard a lot about how testing can help reduce the spread of the coronavirus.**

So, the government have said they will be rolling out more mass-testing facilities in schools over the next few weeks, where every student and staff member is tested regularly.

Newsround spoke to some pupils from a school in Liverpool, who were one of the first in the country to experience what turned out to be a military operation...

Check this out!

- Published7 December 2020
